location.office_time_required: hybrid to NYC HelloFresh Headquarters (specific days not stated)

level_signals: 3–6 years of experience in growth, lifecycle, strategy, analytics, or DTC operating roles
Comp range $121,500–$136,700 base, consistent with mid-senior IC
Reports to General Manager, works closely with Head of Growth

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3–6 years of experience in growth, lifecycle, strategy, analytics, or DTC operating roles
Strong hands-on experience with cohort analysis and performance reporting
Experience working in Shopify and Klaviyo
Proven ability to drive measurable revenue impact
Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills (SQL a plus)
Excellent written and verbal communication skills

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills (SQL a plus)

scope.surface: Factor brand growth operations — channel marketing, lifecycle, analytics, experimentation, and LTV/CAC modeling
scope.business_model: DTC subscription (meal kit / prepared food delivery)
core_responsibilities: Manage channel setup and execution work including onboarding new platforms and tracking, attribution, creating discount codes, and maintaining UTM infrastructure
Review and approve creative and messaging from agency partners daily, ensuring alignment with brand standards and active campaign strategy
Coordinate influencer and affiliate product sampling logistics end-to-end
Maintain landing pages, promotional flows, and campaign assets across active channels
Own performance reporting that surfaces what's working quickly enough to act on it
Maintain and refine LTV models across product segments to ensure CAC targets stay accurate as our channel mix evolves
Identify highest-leverage growth opportunities across the funnel and translate them into clear, prioritized testing roadmaps
Build dashboards and recurring reporting that drive decision-making across the team
Design, prioritize, and analyze A/B tests across lifecycle and on-site surfaces
Own the operational layer so the Head of Growth can focus on strategy and channel expansion

compensation.equity_form: company equity plan based on role

green_flags: Equity plan mentioned in addition to base
Clear reporting structure (General Manager) and close collaboration with Head of Growth
Role has well-defined ownership areas (ops layer + analytics backbone)
Generous benefits including 401k with immediate vesting, up to 16 weeks parental leave, and $0 health options from day one
Role is within an established brand (Factor) inside HelloFresh, offering stability with startup-like autonomy
red_flags: Hybrid requirement in NYC only — eliminates fully-remote candidates
Very broad scope (marketing ops + analytics + experimentation + LTV modeling) for a single IC role; may indicate understaffing
Work authorization and visa sponsorship not mentioned anywhere in the JD
Role title is 'Growth Manager' but responsibilities overlap heavily with analytics/ops; archetype classification is ambiguous

fields_inferred_not_stated: scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities and 'you are' section; not explicitly listed)
scope.business_model (inferred from DTC subscription language and HelloFresh/Factor context)
ambiguities: SQL is listed inline as '(SQL a plus)' within a must-have bullet about Excel/Google Sheets. Treated as a nice-to-have (soft) while Excel/Google Sheets are treated as hard requirements.

Archetype is ambiguous: the role blends Growth PM, BizOps/Strategy & Ops, and marketing operations. Classified as Growth PM with secondary BizOps given primary framing around growth execution and analytics.
Office time frequency not specified beyond 'hybrid to NYC HelloFresh Headquarters'; specific days-per-week unknown.
